{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell is performing reconnaissance by executing 'whoami /groups', attempting to establish persistence or execute obfuscated code by setting a base64-encoded PowerShell command in the registry, and attempting a UAC bypass by hijacking the 'ms-settings' URI handler and subsequently launching 'fodhelper.exe'.",
  "indicators": [
    "whoami.exe /groups",
    "registry modification for ms-settings handler",
    "fodhelper.exe execution",
    "base64 encoded PowerShell command in registry",
    "hidden PowerShell execution"
  ]
}
